active_alerts.title: Missing canonical
active_alerts.description: The page does not define a canonical URL.

active_alerts.title: No structured data (JSON-LD) detected
active_alerts.description: The page has no JSON-LD schema markup. Structured data is required for rich results (FAQ, HowTo, Article, Product) and helps Google understand page context for AI Overviews.

active_alerts.title: No WebSite structured data detected
active_alerts.description: No WebSite JSON-LD schema was found across crawled pages. Google uses WebSite structured data (with name and url properties) to determine the preferred site name shown in search results. Without it, G

active_alerts.title: Meta description too long (239 chars)
active_alerts.description: Meta descriptions over 160 characters are truncated by Google, cutting off the CTA.

active_alerts.title: Thin content — below 300 words
active_alerts.description: Page body contains only 29 words. Thin pages rarely satisfy user intent and are unlikely to be cited in AI Overviews.

active_alerts.title: No favicon detected on any crawled page
active_alerts.description: No <link rel='icon'> (or apple-touch-icon) tag was found across crawled pages. Google displays the site favicon next to search results — a missing favicon means Google falls back to a generic globe ic

active_alerts.title: No WebSite structured data detected
